title: LEMIKKLE Shoe Rack, Oak Wooden Shoe Storage Rack, 2 Tier Stainless Steel Expandable Design, Ideal for Small Shoe Rack for Narrow Space, Suitable for Entrances, Garages, Bedrooms, Cloakrooms
features: Expandable Design: Wood 2-Tier Shoe Racks for Entryway, Sturdy & Durable Shoe Shelf, Stackable Shoe Racks for Closet. Minimum length 18 in, you can expand it to 32 in.

Strong load-bearing capacity: The 2 tier shoe rack is made of high-density oak, which not only increases its beauty and lifespan, but also ensures its load-bearing capacity. The middle part of the shoe rack storage tube is made of thickened metal, and each layer can withstand a weight of 50 pounds. Even if it is filled with heavy shoes for a long time, it will not bend or break.

Simple & Stylish: The vintage wooden frame of this long shoe storage cabinet is combined with sturdy metal materials to make your home look great, and the simple modern design will definitely brighten up your entrance area.

Flexible Adjustment: The length of the shoe racks can be flexibly adjusted according to different spaces and needs, with the maximum extended to 32in×18in×9.4in. It can hold up to 8 pairs of shoes, and the bottom can store additional slippers, keeping the home clean and tidy.

Space Saving Shoe Organizer: The adjustable shoe rack is small, compact, and suitable for a variety of spaces, whether in small places such as doorways, entryways, hallways, living rooms, bedrooms, garages, or closets. It provides a space-saving solution to store your shoes.
description: Product Description Entryway Expandable wooden shoe rack Expandable Shoe Rack: The length of the shoe racks can be flexibly adjusted according to different spaces and needs, with the maximum extended to 34.4×14×9.6inches. It can hold up to 8 pairs of shoes, and the bottom can store additional slippers, keeping the home clean and tidy.
